title: achillea aleppica subsp. zederbaueri
intro: Achillea aleppica subsp. zederbaueri, also known as Zederbauer's yarrow, is a subspecies of the yarrow plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic compounds. The health benefits of Zederbauer's yarrow include reducing fever, alleviating menstrual cramps, and soothing digestive issues, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Achillea aleppica subsp. zederbaueri can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
